sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian in ah a Tapa hong sawi,
Hong it ding leh hong damsak ding;
Ka mawhna te maisak ding hong pai,
Nungta ahi manin a han guak bek om hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nungta ahih man bangbang piang ta se leh,
Phamawh sa keng zong lau bek keng;
Mailam hun te a khut sung om cih thei ing,
Amah nungta ahih man ka nun na'n man nei.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Naungek te zong Amah'n hong kepsak,
Bangzah ta in lungdam huai hiam?
Tua sangin zong lungdam huai zaw lai,
Nungta aihman lau nang om lo cih thu mahmah.'

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ni khat ni ciang sihna gungal ah,
Haksa pi-in ka kan ding hi;
Tua hun ciangin sihna zozo in,
Amah Kumpi ahihlam ka mu thei ding hi.
